ogTitle: Mowbray vs Musselroe Bay: Climate Safety

heading: Mowbray vs Musselroe Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mowbray, Tasmania and Musselroe Bay, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Musselroe Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mowbray (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mowbray or Musselroe Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mowbray has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Musselroe Bay scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mowbray scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Musselroe Bay scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mowbray or Musselroe Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Musselroe Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
